days.label: Push Day ? Chest, Shoulders & Triceps
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + arm circles + band pull-aparts

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 130 ? no log came in for Monday this week, so we're stuck here for the third week in a row. This is a problem. You logged Wednesday and Friday just fine, so there's no reason bench doesn't get logged too. The standard hasn't changed: hit 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under and you earn 135. Pause at the chest, drive through the heels, no bouncing. Log it.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 40 ? still no log from Monday's push sessions, so no movement here either. You earned the bump to 45 two weeks ago with 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/7 and we've been waiting for a confirmed session ever since. Log this one. 30-degree incline, control the negative, full range of motion.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? same story, no push day log means no progress. Three weeks ago you went 10/9/8 at RPE 7/9/9 ? not there yet even if you'd logged it. Need all 3 sets at 10 reps, RPE 8 or under. Brace the core, don't lean back, full lockout at the top.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Staying at 10 ? we've been asking for 12/12/12 with a 2-second hold at the top for three weeks and still haven't seen a push day log. Same ask again: slight bend in the elbows, lead with the elbows not the hands, 2-second hold at the top, slow controlled negative. Log it or we'll be here all summer.

exercises.name: Close-Grip Bench Press
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? no log, no movement. The target is still 10/10/10 to earn 105. Hands shoulder-width, elbows tucked tight, full lockout at the top every rep.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? swapping out dumbbell overhead extension this week to hit the triceps from a different angle. Rope attachment on the cable, elbows pinned to your sides, split the rope apart at the bottom and fully extend. This is a great finisher after close-grip bench. Pick a weight you can hit 10-12 at RPE 7-8 and log the exact number. We need a baseline to work from.

days.cooldown: Stretch chest, shoulders, and triceps ? 5 min

days.label: Pull Day ? Back, Biceps & Rear Delts
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + band pull-aparts + cat-cow stretches

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 195 ? you logged 8/8/8 at RPE 7/7/8 this week. Solid and consistent, but you're sitting at the bottom of the rep range. Need to push into 9-10 reps per set to earn the jump to 205. RPE is fine ? energy is there. This week, push for 2 more reps per set. Brace hard off the floor, pull through the heels, controlled descent.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Single-Arm Row
exercises.notes: Staying at 50 ? you logged 10/8/8 at RPE 8/8/8 this week. Set 1 was great but sets 2 and 3 dropped off. Not consistent enough to move. Hit 10/10/10 at RPE 8 or under across all three sets to earn 55. Pull to the hip, squeeze at the top for a full second, slow the negative. Each side.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.notes: Staying at 100 ? you logged 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/8 this week. Top of the rep range but RPE crept up again on sets 2 and 3 ? same as two weeks ago. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 110. Wide grip on the lat bar, pull to upper chest, squeeze the lats at the bottom, no leaning back into a row. Stay disciplined on the form.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.notes: NEW ROTATION ? rotating out reverse flyes (you hit 15/15/15 at RPE 6/6/6 this week ? great, and we'll bring them back in two weeks). Cable face pulls are next up for rear delt work. Rope attachment at upper pulley, pull to your face, and externally rotate at the end so your thumbs point behind you. Lighter than you think ? this is a shoulder health exercise. Start at a weight you can hit 12-15 at RPE 7 and log it.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? you logged 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8 this week. Perfect rep count but RPE is right at the ceiling for a bump. Need the same 10/10/10 but at RPE 7 or under to earn 70. Stay strict ? no swinging, no momentum, full squeeze at the top and slow the negative.

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? you logged 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8 this week. Still in range but not at the top, and RPE is at the ceiling. Need 12/12/12 at RPE 8 or under to earn 35. Neutral grip, control the negative, no momentum. These should be slow and deliberate ? if you're swinging at all, that's why reps are capping at 10.

days.cooldown: Stretch lats, biceps, and upper back ? 5 min

days.label: Leg Day ? Quads, Hamstrings, Glutes & Core
days.warmup: 5 min light cardio + bodyweight squats + leg swings

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 165 ? you logged 8/8/8 at RPE 7/7/7 this week. Consistent and well within your capacity, but you're sitting at the bottom of the rep range all three sets. RPE is low ? you clearly have more in the tank. Push for 9-10 reps this week. Hit 9-10 across all 3 sets at RPE 8 or under and we go to 175. Below parallel, brace your core, drive through the heels.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Staying at 145 ? you proved it this week: 10/10/10 at RPE 7/8/8. Top of the rep range and RPE is acceptable, but set 3 hit RPE 8 which means there's still some adaptation to do here. Need all 3 sets at RPE 7 to earn 155. Slight knee bend, push the hips back, feel the hamstring stretch, bar close to the shins on the way down.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Staying at 30 ? you went 10/10/10 at RPE 8/8/8 this week. Consistent, which is progress from before, but still not at the top of the range. Need 12/12/12 per side to earn 35. Rear foot on the bench, drop straight down, drive through the front heel. You've been capping at 10 ? intentionally push past that this week.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.notes: UP 10 lb from 65 ? earned it with 12/12/12 at RPE 7/7/7 this week. Perfect. Upper back on the bench, drive through the heels, full hip extension, squeeze the glutes hard at the top and hold for a full second. At 75 lbs, aim for 10-12 at RPE 7-8. Log it.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.notes: Staying at 65 ? you ignored the drop-weight advice (we said 45-50) and went in at 65 anyway, then hit 15/15/15 at RPE 6/6/7. I'll take it ? that's actually a great result. Weight is confirmed at 65. Hit 15/15/15 at RPE 6-7 again to establish consistency before we move up. Controlled negative, full range of motion.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.notes: Good work this week ? you logged 10/10/10 at RPE 7/7/9 with the 10 lb dumbbell. Sets 1 and 2 were clean but set 3 spiked to RPE 9. Staying at 10 lb. Same execution: hold the dumbbell behind your head as you extend, 3 sec out, 3 sec back, opposite arm and leg. Lower back glued to the floor the entire time. If set 3 spikes again, drop to 5 lb for that set ? don't compromise position for the weight.

days.cooldown: Stretch quads, hamstrings, hip flexors ? 5 min
